claims.claim: Given a plan $P = [p_1, p_2, \ldots, p_n]$ consisting of ordered steps and an execution trace $E = [e_1, e_2, \ldots, e_m]$ consisting of ordered events, the tribunal produces a drift verdict $V \in \{\text{drift}, \text{clean}\}$ and, when drift is detected, a set of drift labels indicating which modalities were observed.
